mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_settings ( user_id, default_video_on, default_audio_on, reminder_time, desktop_notification, sound_notification, meeting_invite_notification, friend_request_notification, show_online_status, allow_stranger_add, dark_mode, language, video_quality, mirror_video, virtual_background, echo_cancellation, noise_suppression, auto_gain_control, share_system_audio, optimize_video_sharing, auto_reconnect, show_network_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{defaultVideoOn}, #{defaultAudioOn}, #{reminderTime}, #{desktopNotification}, #{soundNotification}, #{meetingInviteNotification}, #{friendRequestNotification}, #{showOnlineStatus}, #{allowStrangerAdd}, #{darkMode}, #{language}, #{videoQuality}, #{mirrorVideo}, #{virtualBackground}, #{echoCancellation}, #{noiseSuppression}, #{autoGainControl}, #{shareSystemAudio}, #{optimizeVideoSharing}, #{autoReconnect}, #{showNetworkStatus} )
